creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 177981
Update SKS to 1.1.6

This upgrades SKS to v1.1.6

As this version enables the storage of EC keys, it's quite an important and useful release. (for this reason, i've also requested a quarterly merge)

I have also set the missing LICENSE variable.


Poudriere testport logs for 9/10/11 i386/amd64 are located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/sks/1.1.6/


I'm also currently running the output package from the above on two of my SKS keyservers without issue.
